user.title: Setup Balboa GS500Z Spa
user.description: Enter your EW11A module IP address and port. Find the IP in your router's device list or EW11A web interface (default 192.168.4.1).

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to EW11A module. Check: (1) IP address is correct, (2) Port is 8899, (3) Module is powered on and connected to WiFi.

init.title: Balboa GS500Z Options
init.description: Configure advanced options. Window: larger = more reliable but slower updates (recommended: 5). Guard: prevents invalid mode transitions (recommended: enabled).

error.window_size_too_small: Window size must be at least 3 frames for reliable validation
error.window_size_too_large: Window size cannot exceed 20 frames (would be too slow)
